caption: The video features a man speaking at an event called "theCUBE LIVE at BigDataSV 2015," held at the Fairmont Hotel in San Jose, CA. He is wearing a blue shirt with an "INFOOBJECTS" logo and has a microphone attached to his ear, indicating that he is likely giving a presentation or participating in a panel discussion. The background prominently displays the logos for "theCUBE" and "SiliconANGLE," suggesting that this is a technology or data-focused conference. The man appears engaged and is addressing the audience, possibly discussing topics related to big data and its applications. The setting is professional, with a well-lit stage and clear branding elements visible.
